query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by parcel area descending.

1.description: get Drammen municipality boundary geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones within Drammen municipality extent

3.description: get parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² using kommunenummer filter

5.description: ensure one row per parcel by keeping the largest area if duplicates exist
